members.name: Mr. Bernard Omwega Osero
members.bio: A seasoned communications strategist with over three decades of experience in journalism, public relations, and corporate communications. He served as Head of Corporate Communications at Kenya Ports Authority for 26 years.

members.name: Mr. Ayub M. Mwangi
members.bio: An award-winning communication and public relations professional with over two decades of experience across media, strategic communication, and multimedia production.
